nasb.text: So not a man was left in Ai or Bethel who had not gone out after Israel, and they left the city unguarded and pursued Israel.

esv.text: Not a man was left in Ai or Bethel who did not go out after Israel. They left the city open and pursued Israel.

cnv.text: 艾城和伯特利城沒有留下一個人不出來追趕以色列人；他們撇下了敞開的城門，去追趕以色列人。

ccb.text: 这样，伯特利和艾城的人倾巢而出，追杀以色列人，他们的城门大开。
